title: WizardEx: Directors Cut
description: This updated mod aims to improve the Wizarding experience in Minecraft by integrating it with other fine mods such as itself.
body:
![WizardEX Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/466708298b103a36c3be6f0885e4a89afbbe68a7.png) --- ![WizardEX Alpha Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc77dbfb509a6b7bd8162f0cba5ecf79f6cb4157.png) 💖 **No robes/staff here~** *Robes and staff bonuses are calculated when worn and shown in the menu!* --- This mod aims to improve the [Wizarding](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wizards) experience in Minecraft by integrating it with other fine mods such as itself. Currently, the mod only supports integration with PlayerEx by adding a new "Magic" page that allows the player to allocate their skill points gained by leveling up on the available schools of magic. The currently available schools are:~~~~ - Fire - Frost - Arcane - Healing - Lightning - Soul ## How does it work? Each level in intelligence (base PlayerEx stat) raised improves all magic schools by 0.25 points. Each level into a specific school of magic will raise it by 0.5, giving you an edge in that school of magic while hampering you in others. Check out the original mod [here!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wizardex)

Use code "BAREMINIMUM" to get 15% off your first month!
